title: Looking to hire a specialist asap
excerpt: Hi all, we are looking to hire a specialist- as we are new to Monday and want to hire someone to optimize all our workflows and processes in Monday. We are a fast growing company, but a small team so want to focus on our…

posts.author: goPure (alex keyan)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi all, we are looking to hire a specialist- as we are new to Monday and want to hire someone to optimize all our workflows and processes in Monday. We are a fast growing company, but a small team so want to focus on our core business and let an expert handle this setup and train us on how to best use it. The initial project would be to go over our current processes and business practices, come up with a plan for how to best manage that in MOnday and then implement. We would then need ongoing help with optimizing and adjusting based on new projects as we grow. Please reach out to me here or at alex@gopurenaturals.com. thank you!

posts.author: Avital-monday.com (Avital Cohen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @goPure! Nice to e-meet you, I’m Avital from monday.com Partners team.
Where are you based and what does your company do? That will help me find you a specialist to help you

posts.author: goPure (alex keyan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Avital,

We are based in the Los Angeles area and we are a Direct to Consumer Skin Care brand! Looking forward to meeting a partner or two to hire. thank you!

posts.author: Avital-monday.com (Avital Cohen)
posts.cookedHtml: Dror from my team will reach out to you soon

posts.author: Dror (Dror )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @goPure, I forwarded your request to one of our certified partners in the US and they will be in touch soon. Please let me know if you have additional questions.
Cheers!

posts.author: gsandler (Greg Sandler)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Avital My company Dynamic Machine is new to Monday.com and we would like to hire a specialist to help us as well. We are a fast growing company, but a small team so want to focus on our core business and let an expert handle this setup and train us on how to best use it. The initial project would be to go over our current processes and business practices, come up with a plan for how to best manage that in MOnday and then implement. We would then need ongoing help with optimizing and adjusting based on new projects as we grow. Please reach out to me at gsandler@dynamicmachine.com. thanks Greg

posts.author: Avital-monday.com (Avital Cohen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thanks @gsandler!
@Dror see Greg’s message, his company is based in Detroit.
